chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.D-409 of 2025. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 31.07.2025 Mr. Ghulam Yaseen A. Junejo, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Addl. A. G, Sindh. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl. P. G. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Through this petition, the petitioner seeks his release on post-arrest bail in Crime No.13/2025, registered at Police Station Dokri, District Larkana, under Section 9-(c) Sr. No.3(b) of the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances Act, 2024. Since the amendments have been made by the Provincial Assembly of Sindh in the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances Act, 2024 (Sindh Act No. VIII of 2024) through the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances (Amendment) Act, 2025, however, the same is yet to receive the assent of the Governor and to be published in the official Gazette, the petitioner has remedy to approach the appropriate forum / Special Court or competent Court for bail. The impugned order dated 21.04.2025, passed by learned Sessions Judge/Special Judge for CNS cases, Larkana was coram non judice at that time and now after amended Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances (Amendment) Act, 2025, the trial Court is competent to rehear the matter under the guidelines provided by this Court in C. P. No. D-625 of 2025 (Re: Hafeezullah Lashari v. Province of Sindh and others) at Circuit Court Larkana and C. P. No. D-725 of 2025 (Re: Peer Bux v. The State and others) at Circuit Court Hyderabad. In view of the above, instant petition is disposed of, leaving the petitioner at liberty to approach the appropriate forum / Special Court or competent Court for bail after issuance of proper notification through official Gazette.

The State and others) at Circuit Court Hyderabad. In view of the above, instant petition is disposed of, leaving the petitioner at liberty to approach the appropriate forum / Special Court or competent Court for bail after issuance of proper notification through official Gazette. Judge Judge M Yousuf Panhwar/**
